Name: Average time for Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Completed + In Call and the end of the case

Name: Total time for Completed + In Call
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity Completed + In Call and the end of the case

Name: Minimum time for Completed + In Call
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity Completed + In Call and the end of the case

Name: Time of Completed + In Call
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity Completed + In Call and the end of the case

Name: Completed + In Call Cycle Time
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity Completed + In Call and the end of the case

Name: Average time from Accepted + In Progress to Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + In Progress' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Total time from Accepted + In Progress to Completed + In Call
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + In Progress' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Minimum time from Accepted + In Progress to Completed + In Call
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + In Progress' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Average time between consecutive occurrences of Completed + In Call within the same case
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Completed + In Call' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Total duration of Completed + In Call compared to Completed + Resolved in variants where both occur
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity Completed + In Call and activity Completed + Resolved for cases where activity Completed + Resolved occurs

Name: Average time spent in Completed + In Call relative to the total case duration in variants ending with Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Completed + In Call and the end of the case

Name: Minimum time between Completed + In Call and the preceding Accepted + In Progress activity
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + In Progress' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Total time from Completed + In Call to the next Completed + Resolved in variants where both occur
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity Completed + In Call and activity Completed + Resolved for cases where activity Completed + Resolved occurs

Name: Average duration of Completed + In Call in variants that do not proceed to Completed + Closed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Completed + In Call' and the end of case where activity 'Completed + Closed does not occur

Name: Time elapsed from case start to Completed + In Call in variants where Completed + In Call is the final activity
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity Completed + In Call and the end of the case

Name: Average time for Completed + In Call grouped by country
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Completed + In Call' and the end of case grouped by the last value of organization country

Name: Minimum time for Completed + In Call grouped by product
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Completed + In Call' and the end of case grouped by the last value of product

Name: Total time from Queued + Awaiting Assignment to Completed + In Call in variants containing both activities
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Average time between Accepted + Wait - User and Completed + In Call when they occur consecutively
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait - User' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Elapsed time between Completed + In Call and the immediately following Accepted + In Progress in looping variants
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Completed + In Call' and activity 'Accepted + In Progress'
